title: Padeswood CCUS project: summary business case
body: "From 11 June 2025, all projects and programmes on the Government Major Projects Portfolio (GMPP) are required to publish a Summary Business Case, Full Business Case (FBC), or Programme Business Case within four months of receiving HM Treasury approval. This is to provide greater transparency on how HMG business cases are developed and how decisions are made.  This Summary Business Case supports the case for investment in the HyNet cluster for the deployment of the Padeswood carbon capture, usage and storage (CCUS) project.  "
